# FocusPort

> FocusPort is a free Android app that blocks distracting apps (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok) during focus sessions using Android Accessibility Service. No bypasses. Sessions can't be exited without breaking your streak.

## App
- Name: FocusPort
- Platform: Android (Google Play)
- Package: com.focusport.app
- Category: Productivity / Focus / App Blocker
- Price: Free (with optional premium)
- Play Store: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.focusport.app

## Key Features
- Blocks selected apps during timed focus sessions
- No easy bypass — only a 5-second hold that breaks your streak
- Emergency app whitelist (Phone, WhatsApp, etc.)
- Scheduled automatic sessions
- Streak tracking and session history
- Works offline
- Uses Accessibility Service for real blocking

## Contact
- Email: focusportapp@gmail.com
- Privacy: https://focusport.github.io/focusport-privacy/
